templates.title: Team Habit Tracker
answers: A lightweight web application for small remote teams to track shared daily habits such as standups, code review, and learning time. Teams see a weekly scoreboard and streak counters. The product targets startups with 5–30 people.

Each morning users open the dashboard, mark habits done with one click, and optionally add a short note. Managers can view team progress but not edit individual entries. Notifications remind users before end of day.
Prefer React on the frontend, REST API, PostgreSQL, email-only notifications, no mobile native apps for v1.

templates.title: Freelancer Invoice Lite
answers: A simple invoicing tool for freelancers to create branded PDF invoices, track paid vs unpaid, and send reminders. Supports one currency and basic tax line items.
User creates a client, adds line items, generates a PDF, emails it from the app, and marks payment received when the client pays. Dashboard shows overdue invoices.
Web only, Stripe for optional online payment links later, no accounting integrations in v1.

templates.title: Family Recipe Box
answers: A private recipe organizer for families: store recipes with photos, tags, and cooking times. Search by ingredient or tag. Share read-only links with relatives.
Users add recipes via a form, upload a photo, assign tags, and browse a grid. Clicking a recipe shows steps and a printable layout.
Static hosting friendly frontend, Firebase or similar backend acceptable, English UI only.

templates.title: Small Event RSVP
answers: RSVP mini-site for weddings and parties: host creates an event, sets capacity, collects guest names plus meal choice. Guests respond without accounts via magic link.
Host dashboard shows headcount and meal tallies. Guests open link, confirm attendance, pick meal, submit once.
No payments in v1, GDPR-aware export of guest list CSV, mobile-first responsive layout.

templates.title: Office Equipment Loaner
answers: Internal tool for IT to track laptops, monitors, and peripherals loaned to employees. Check-out and check-in with condition notes and due dates.
Staff request hardware from inventory; IT approves and assigns serial numbers. Return flow captures condition and clears assignment.
Single company deployment, LDAP or SSO later, barcode scanning optional, web dashboard for IT only.

templates.title: Developer Reading List
answers: Personal reading list for developers: save articles and docs with URL, title auto-fetch, tags like 'frontend' or 'devops', and archive when read.
User pastes URL, app fetches Open Graph title, user edits tags, filters by unread, marks as read with timestamp.
Browser extension out of scope; simple CRUD web app with dark mode toggle.

templates.title: Pet Vet Visit Log
answers: Pet owners log vet visits, vaccinations, and medications for multiple pets. Reminder emails before next due vaccine.
Add pet profile, add visit with date and notes, upload optional PDF from vet, see timeline per pet.
Consumer web app, one household per account, no vet portal in v1, English only.
